name: TensorPM v1.12.5-beta.1 (Beta)
body:
# Changelog - v1.12.5-beta.1

## 🎉 New Features

### People are captured when a project is created from text

When TensorPM generates a project from your prompt or a document — including the first project created during onboarding — it now carries the people it identifies straight into the project.

**What Changed:**

- ✅ **Named people become project people** — Individuals named in your description (e.g. "Maya Chen", "Dr. Müller") are added with their role group, roles, and influence instead of being dropped.
- ✅ **Consistent across entry points** — Prompt-to-project, document-to-project, and onboarding now share the same enriched project structure.

**User Benefit:**
Your stakeholder list starts populated, so you spend less time re-entering who is involved right after generating a project.

## 🏗️ Improvements

### Deeper, more realistic project plans from short prompts

The project-generation prompts now size the plan to the project itself, not to how much you typed.

**What Changed:**

- ✅ **Depth follows the project, not the prompt length** — A short description of a substantial undertaking (e.g. "build a 120 m² house, €600k, near Berlin") now produces a full, deep plan, with the reasoning captured as explicit assumptions.
- ✅ **Plan size scales with scope** — Requirements, milestones, success criteria, and risks expand for complex projects instead of being capped at a fixed range, while still avoiding filler.
- ✅ **Milestones fit the domain** — Phasing now adapts to the kind of project (e.g. construction: permitting → groundwork → shell → fit-out → handover), not only software lifecycles.

**User Benefit:**
A few words about a real project now yield a richer, more useful starting plan that needs less manual filling-in.

## 🧰 Maintenance

- ✅ Dependency updates across the development and production-minor groups.

## 🧪 Testing

- ✅ Onboarding project-prompt drift guard passed (desktop ↔ proxy parity).
- ✅ TypeScript type checking passed.
- ✅ Release quality gates (ESLint, unit tests) enforced by the release pipeline; Playwright E2E skipped for this beta.

## 📝 Notes

The matching proxy-side onboarding prompt was deployed ahead of this release, so first-run/guest project generation uses the same improved prompt.

---

## 📅 Release Info

- **Version**: 1.12.5-beta.1
- **Release Date**: 2026-06-22
- **Previous Version**: 1.12.4-beta.1
- **Type**: Patch Beta Release
